---
species: "Semibalanus balanoides"
accepted_code: "SEBA"
alternate_codes: # "barnacle_SEBA" 
diminutive: 
alternate_diminutives:
common_name: "acorn barnacles"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Diamond shaped opercular aperture and a membranous shell base. Can be up to 15 mm in diameter." # make sure to fill this in!
image: '/header_images/Semibalanus balanoides.jpg'
image_credit: 'Photo from Ellrich, Julius. (https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=image&pic=112767&tid=106210)' # MUST have an image credit
categories:
  - crustaceans
sampling_programs:
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
habitat:
  - intertidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 27500000
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 106210
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) --> 
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** distinguished from other barnacles by the presence of a diamond shaped opercular aperture 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page --> [WORMS PAGE](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=106210)
